title: Number Muncher
short_description: A free online arcade math game: steer Munch to gobble only the multiples, factors or primes while dodging the Gremlin.
description: A real arcade game with the maths built into the mechanic — no quizzes. Steer Munch around the number garden and eat only the numbers that fit the changing rule: even, odd, multiples, factors, or primes. Every correct munch scores and builds a combo; eat a wrong number and you spit it out and lose points. All the while a hungry Gremlin hunts you across the field — get chomped and you lose a heart. Pick a grade band (Grade 1–2 even/odd, Grade 3 multiples, Grade 4–5 factors & primes) and survive the timer for the biggest score. Number sense becomes pure reflex. Great for kids in grades 1–5 practising times tables, multiples, factors and prime numbers. Finishing posts a score to the leaderboard for GP.
controls: Move the mouse or drag to steer Munch (glides toward your pointer); or use WASD / arrow keys. Eat numbers that fit the rule, avoid the Gremlin.
